name: Foureyes Furniture
oneLine: Cinematic woodworking and modern-furniture YouTuber whose macro-shot, music-driven edits stand apart from technical-tutorial channels.
bio: Chris Salomone is a Cal State Fullerton business graduate (2006) who built Foureyes Furniture into a full-time YouTube woodworking business while serving as marketing director for CSUF's College of Humanities and Social Sciences. He published his first video in March 2016 and grew to over 437,000 subscribers, eventually quitting his day job. He differentiated the channel by using improvised guitar music and tight macro plus wide environmental shots rather than the technique-only style dominant in woodworking YouTube.
style: cinematic, music-driven, macro-and-wide shot build videos with minimal narration
notable: This Old House Makers Channel feature
